portfolio.title: Open Concept Interior
portfolio.summary: Bright interior coverage that shows the relationship between living, dining, and kitchen spaces.
portfolio.description: This example shows how a listing gallery can lead with clean composition, natural-feeling light, and a clear sense of room flow. It is a strong placeholder for homes where the main living area is the primary selling point.
portfolio.alt: Open concept living room with large windows and modern furniture

gallery.alt: Wide open living room view with modern seating and natural light
gallery.caption: Main living area hero angle

gallery.alt: Kitchen and dining area photographed for a real estate listing
gallery.caption: Connected kitchen and dining coverage

gallery.alt: Bright kitchen and hallway view used as a walkthrough preview
gallery.caption: Walkthrough-ready interior perspective

portfolio.title: Twilight Exterior Showcase
portfolio.summary: Exterior photography built around curb appeal, architectural lighting, and a premium evening feel.
portfolio.description: This example gives the portfolio a polished exterior case study. It is useful for showing how twilight-style images can make a listing feel elevated without needing a long gallery.
portfolio.alt: Modern home exterior photographed at twilight with warm interior lights

gallery.alt: Modern home exterior at twilight with large windows and warm lighting
gallery.caption: Twilight hero exterior

gallery.alt: Modern home front exterior with landscaping and driveway
gallery.caption: Daylight front approach

gallery.alt: Modern courtyard entry and driveway photographed from the street
gallery.caption: Entry and arrival detail

portfolio.title: Lowcountry Drone Context
portfolio.summary: Aerial coverage that gives buyers a better sense of neighborhood, lot position, and surrounding context.
portfolio.description: Drone imagery is especially valuable when the property setting matters. This example demonstrates the kind of top-down and community-level context that complements ground photography.
portfolio.alt: Aerial view of a residential neighborhood surrounded by trees

gallery.alt: Aerial neighborhood view with houses and tree canopy
gallery.caption: Neighborhood context

gallery.alt: Top-down aerial view of homes and backyards
gallery.caption: Top-down lot relationship

gallery.alt: Exterior pool home used to connect aerial and ground-level coverage
gallery.caption: Ground-level support angle

portfolio.title: Walkthrough Video Preview
portfolio.summary: Video-style preview frames that show movement through the property and help clients picture a full walkthrough.
portfolio.description: This example gives the Video category a concrete placeholder. It uses still frames to represent the kind of smooth walkthrough coverage that can be used on MLS, social media, and listing pages.
portfolio.alt: Bright kitchen and hallway view used as a real estate walkthrough video preview

gallery.alt: Bright kitchen and hallway frame for a walkthrough video
gallery.caption: Interior movement frame

gallery.alt: Living area frame used to preview video flow
gallery.caption: Living area transition

gallery.alt: Exterior establishing shot for a property video
gallery.caption: Exterior establishing frame

portfolio.title: Kitchen & Dining Detail
portfolio.summary: Detail-focused interior photography for kitchens, dining areas, finishes, and natural gathering spaces.
portfolio.description: A strong real estate portfolio should show more than wide rooms. This example demonstrates how detail and lifestyle-adjacent images can support the main listing gallery.
portfolio.alt: Warm kitchen and dining area with island seating

gallery.alt: Kitchen island and dining area photographed with warm interior light
gallery.caption: Kitchen and dining detail

gallery.alt: Bright kitchen walkway photographed for listing flow
gallery.caption: Kitchen flow perspective

portfolio.title: Poolside Coastal Exterior
portfolio.summary: Outdoor living photography for pool homes, patios, and resort-style listing amenities.
portfolio.description: This example gives the Exterior category a second style: bright daytime amenity coverage. It helps show how exterior photography can sell lifestyle as well as structure.
portfolio.alt: White coastal home with swimming pool and landscaped outdoor area

gallery.alt: Poolside exterior of a white coastal home
gallery.caption: Pool and outdoor living

gallery.alt: Modern entry and driveway exterior detail
gallery.caption: Entry detail

portfolio.title: Top-Down Lot Study
portfolio.summary: Straight-down aerial imagery that clarifies lot layout, neighboring homes, yards, and access points.
portfolio.description: This example is useful for larger lots, corner lots, planned communities, and properties where buyers need to understand scale or placement from above.
portfolio.alt: Top-down drone view of homes, yards, and residential lots

gallery.alt: Top-down aerial view showing lot layout and neighboring homes
gallery.caption: Top-down property context

gallery.alt: Aerial view of a residential community from above
gallery.caption: Community-level aerial view

portfolio.title: Social Reel Exterior Preview
portfolio.summary: Short-form video preview coverage designed for social media, reels, and high-impact listing teasers.
portfolio.description: This example rounds out the Video category with a social-first use case. It shows how an exterior establishing frame can support a quick reel, teaser, or listing announcement.
portfolio.alt: Tall exterior establishing shot of a modern residential building

gallery.alt: Exterior establishing frame for a social real estate video
gallery.caption: Vertical-friendly exterior frame

gallery.caption: Front approach teaser
